articles.title: Legacy extend unbeaten streak to five games with draw at Bay FC despite playing second half with 10 players
articles.description:
The draw stretched the expansion club's unbeaten run to five games at 2-0-3.

The post Legacy extend unbeaten streak to five games with draw at Bay FC despite playing second half with 10 players appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Legacy's unbeaten streak reaches five games after a draw against Bay FC.
Team's record now stands at 2 wins, 0 losses, and 3 draws.
Boston residents see continued support for the expansion club's performance.

articles.title: Red Sox place Trevor Story on injured list with sports hernia, contemplating surgery
articles.description:
Boston recalled INF Nick Sogard from Triple-A as the corresponding move.

The post Red Sox place Trevor Story on injured list with sports hernia, contemplating surgery appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Sox placed Trevor Story on the injured list due to a sports hernia.
Boston recalled INF Nick Sogard from Triple-A to fill the roster gap.
Story's potential surgery may affect the team's performance this season.
